recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ask the librarian about the inter-library loan service?
recent_60_samples.answer: she asked whether the printed catalog was still updated regularly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Brigitta say about her new commute?
recent_60_samples.answer: Brigitta no longer rides the express train to the downtown campus.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finished the application for the summer grant yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: Unfortunately, I have not gathered all the required supporting documents.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me how your weekend at the conference went.
recent_60_samples.answer: The speaker Quintin admired delivered a memorable keynote address.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your roommate want to discuss with you last night?
recent_60_samples.answer: He could not decide whether to renew the lease for next semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did the dean place the new orientation pamphlets?
recent_60_samples.answer: The pamphlets were displayed near the main entrance of the auditorium.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed any difference in your study habits this semester?
recent_60_samples.answer: This study lounge feels considerably calmer than the central reading hall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you leave the laboratory early on Tuesday evening?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left early because the equipment had been reserved by another team.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the academic advisor mention about your transcript?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered when the registrar would correct the calculus grade.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what you discovered at the careers fair on Thursday.
recent_60_samples.answer: The recruiter explained how summer internships would be allocated this year.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Astrid mention about the bulletin board today?
recent_60_samples.answer: The notice the dean posted explained the revised dormitory procedure.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Theodora finish her senior project portfolio yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: Theodora has not uploaded the final presentation file yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk with Yusra about her thesis defense rehearsal?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yusra wanted to know if her committee members had received the slides.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you store the field samples after the lab?
recent_60_samples.answer: I placed the soil samples inside the cabinet beside the centrifuge.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Magnus mention about the new biology elective?
recent_60_samples.answer: Magnus was curious whether the laboratory hours fit his evening schedule.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you visit the new student wellness office this week?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, the appointment system has not been launched online yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed any changes in the writing center?
recent_60_samples.answer: The writing center feels much warmer than the old basement office did.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Hector tell you after the seminar yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hector explained why the visiting scholar postponed his afternoon lecture.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what happened with the shuttle service this morning.
recent_60_samples.answer: The driver announced that the morning route would be detoured.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Sebastien skip the orchestra rehearsal last evening?
recent_60_samples.answer: Sebastien overslept because his alarm clock failed to ring properly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you discover at the registrar's office?
recent_60_samples.answer: The clerk explained why the transcript request had been delayed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Sienna mention about the new course?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether the workload included weekly group projects.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the recruiter ask you yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: She was curious about my volunteer hours at the community center.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you store the chemistry samples?
recent_60_samples.answer: The technician explained where the vials had been relocated.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you leave the seminar early?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, I could not focus after the long commute home.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you say about the parking notice?
recent_60_samples.answer: The fine was reduced once I appealed to the office.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sign up for the field trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: Mariana has not confirmed the registration deadline yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finished your group presentation?
recent_60_samples.answer: The slides Diana prepared cover the main case studies thoroughly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what Carla noticed about the lab manual.
recent_60_samples.answer: Carla mentioned that the binder sat next to the printer.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Marcos say about the rescheduled meeting?
recent_60_samples.answer: Theodore wondered whether the new agenda had been emailed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you mention about the orientation program?
recent_60_samples.answer: This year's workshop felt more engaging than the previous semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the dean announce at the assembly yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: He explained how the funding cuts would affect graduate research.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you discover during the field study trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: Unfortunately, the samples have not survived the long return journey.

recent_60_samples.prompt: When did the chemistry tutor email you?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hina asked the secretary when the tutoring sessions would resume.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you submit your application before midnight?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was unsure whether the portal accepted late submissions.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you talked with your advisor about credits?
recent_60_samples.answer: Professor Reyes mentioned that several transfer courses had been rejected.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you skip the rehearsal on Thursday?
recent_60_samples.answer: Renaldo wanted to know whether the conductor postponed the dress rehearsal.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what Esme said about the dorm complaint.
recent_60_samples.answer: She mentioned that the maintenance crew arrived after midnight unexpectedly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me about your scholarship application progress.
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not finished the personal statement section yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Describe how Olympia felt before the showcase.
recent_60_samples.answer: The pieces she chose required substantially more practice than expected.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me how your registration went this morning.
recent_60_samples.answer: It's already closed for the seminar Lucia recommended.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian tell you about the deadline change?
recent_60_samples.answer: The deadline has been pushed to next Friday afternoon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the lecturer mention about tomorrow's chemistry quiz?
recent_60_samples.answer: The lecturer asked if you'd reviewed the practice problems.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed anything strange about the dorm lounge?
recent_60_samples.answer: The vending machine no longer accepts our meal cards.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your friend say about joining the debate club?
recent_60_samples.answer: A friend told me when they're meeting this Thursday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where does the shuttle stop after the engineering building?
recent_60_samples.answer: Does it also stop near the music building?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me about the book you ordered last week.
recent_60_samples.answer: When did the package that the bookstore shipped finally arrive at your dorm?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you hear about the new tutoring service?
recent_60_samples.answer: The flyer that I saw was posted near the cafeteria entrance.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the tech crew say about your laptop battery?
recent_60_samples.answer: The tech crew haven't billed me for the unexpected repair yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your dorm advisor tell you about quiet hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained why the quiet hours had been extended on weekdays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you going to the gym today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I'm heading there after my afternoon class.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your psychology reading last night?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't started the second chapter yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Cho ask you after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my draft was ready.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what your roommate said about quiet hours.
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether residents must observe quiet hours nightly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Felix skip the seminar this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: Felix couldn't attend because he had a job interview.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what the librarian told you about reserves.
recent_60_samples.answer: She mentioned that the textbook sat behind the front counter.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard from the financial aid office yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: They have not responded to my appeal request.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where do I sign up for the volunteer trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I register for the spring service project?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you been to the new study lounge?
recent_60_samples.answer: The new lounge feels much brighter than the old room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me about your shuttle commute downtown.
recent_60_samples.answer: Does the shuttle also stop near the train station?
